courseTitle: 歷史時刻 This Day in History

vocabulary.definition: To expel large quantities of something rapidly and forcibly.
vocabulary.example: Mount Vesuvius began to spew ash and lava, causing panic among the residents of Pompeii.

vocabulary.definition: To destroy or ruin something completely.
vocabulary.example: The eruption of Mount Vesuvius devastated the city of Pompeii, destroying buildings and lives.

vocabulary.definition: An open circular or oval building with a central space surrounded by tiers of seats for spectators.
vocabulary.example: The amphitheater in Pompeii is one of the oldest known and was used for gladiatorial games and public spectacles.

vocabulary.definition: To find something in the ground by digging.
vocabulary.example: Researchers continue to unearth new discoveries in Pompeii, adding to our understanding of Roman civilization.
